creator: peter.larsen@larsendata.dk
text:
it's more like, anyone that uses mysql, than "Affects Only Me" ;)

I have the same issue, I have reverted to postfix-3.6.2_1,1 Makefile ... that would be the postfix-3.6.2_1,1 from the 30. September, not the postfix-3.6.2_1,1 from the 28. October ...


but this need to be solved, and it sounds like vometia is on track.

I value the effort by everyone, thanks ;)
